commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=df98fff0eaf0541546c0cc693e725d0bfa74c59e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes compaction delivery so hook messages and built-in notifyUser notices can both send, and adds regression coverage for Feishu /compact dispatch plus a plugin SDK testing barrel cleanup.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +60. Total +63 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main's compaction event handler uses hook-message else-if branches that skip notifyUser notices, and the adjacent test expects that suppression. I did not run a live compaction path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer review is needed for the intended double-delivery semantics and contributor-provided real behavior proof; automation should not repair the PR while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve compaction notifyUser notices with hooks
target.body:
## Summary

Refs #90185.

This PR fixes the confirmed Bug 2 portion of #90185: compaction hook messages and the built-in `notifyUser` compaction notices were still mutually exclusive because of `else if` short-circuiting.

It also adds regression coverage for the bundled `@openclaw/feishu` `/compact` command path so that current in-repo Feishu handling continues to enter the standard reply dispatch flow with command metadata intact.

Important scope note: #90185 Bug 1 specifically reports `@larksuite/openclaw-lark@2026.5.20`, whose npm tarball still contains an independent `src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.js::dispatchSystemCommand()` path. That package source is not present in this OpenClaw repository and has no repository metadata in its published `package.json`; this PR should not be treated as a full fix for that external package path unless maintainers confirm the package is generated from another source in this repo.

## Root cause covered by this PR

### Bug 2: compaction `notifyUser` notices suppressed by hook messages

`agent-runner-execution.ts` used `if / else if` delivery chains:

- when `hookMessages.length > 0`, configured compaction hook messages were sent;
- the built-in `notifyUser` notice branch was skipped;
- start/end/incomplete compaction notices could therefore be silently omitted even when `notifyUser` was enabled.

The fix changes those branches into independent checks:

- send configured compaction hook messages when present;
- also send the `notifyUser` compaction notice when requested.

## Bug 1 re-check result

I rechecked the package named by #90185:

```bash
npm pack @larksuite/openclaw-lark@2026.5.20
rg "dispatchSystemCommand|system command dispatched|detected system command|plain-text dispatch" pkg -n
```

The published package still contains:

```text
pkg/src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.js:83:async function dispatchSystemCommand(...)
pkg/src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.js:86:detected system command, using plain-text dispatch
pkg/src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.js:88:dispatchReplyWithBufferedBlockDispatcher(...)
pkg/src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.js:120:system command dispatched (delivered=...)
```

That is the independent path described in #90185. The current OpenClaw repo contains `extensions/feishu` as `@openclaw/feishu`, but does not contain this `@larksuite/openclaw-lark` source tree. Therefore this PR only adds an in-repo guard for the bundled Feishu path; it does not patch the published `@larksuite/openclaw-lark@2026.5.20` code.

## Changes

- Preserve compaction `notifyUser` notices even when compaction hook messages are present.
- Update the existing compaction hook test to assert both hook messages and runtime notices are delivered.
- Add bundled Feishu `/compact` command dispatch regression coverage.
- Normalize `packages/plugin-sdk/src/testing.ts` to satisfy the existing plugin SDK package contract guardrail exposed by CI.

## Validation

Local targeted validation on latest `upstream/main` after rebasing this branch:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts --testNamePattern 'compaction hook messages alongside notifyUser notices|onCompactionStart|incomplete compaction notice' --maxWorkers=1 --pool=forks
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts --testNamePattern 'keeps the package testing barrel as a single deprecated bridge' --maxWorkers=1 --pool=forks
pnpm exec oxlint src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts packages/plugin-sdk/src/testing.ts
git diff --check
```

Result: passed.

The large local `extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts` targeted run was attempted, but the local VM killed the process with `SIGKILL` before assertion output. This is being delegated to GitHub-hosted runners where the full extension shards can run without the local VM pressure.

## GitHub-hosted / real runner validation

A new GitHub-hosted CI run is being triggered against the rebased head SHA:

```text
head: df98fff0eaf0541546c0cc693e725d0bfa74c59e
branch: snowzlm:fix/agents-compact-feishu-delivery
```

Prior pre-rebase run evidence on the previous equivalent patch head passed:

- https://github.com/snowzlm/openclaw/actions/runs/26936197037
- result: success

## Risk / safety

Low-risk runtime delivery change for Bug 2:

- no new external sends are introduced;
- no channel auth or permission boundary changes;
- no compaction hook payload format changes;
- behavior change is limited to sending configured hook messages and requested `notifyUser` notices independently.

Potential behavior change:

- when both hook messages and `notifyUser` are enabled, channels now receive both. This matches the issue expectation and the independent semantics implied by the configuration.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed**: Bug 2 from #90185: configured compaction hook messages no longer suppress built-in `notifyUser` start/end/incomplete compaction notices. Bundled `@openclaw/feishu` `/compact` command dispatch metadata is also guarded.

- **Real environment tested**: Real local OpenClaw workspace on Linux VM (`VM-0-9-ubuntu`) with the patched branch rebased onto latest `upstream/main` and checked out at `df98fff0eaf0541546c0cc693e725d0bfa74c59e`, plus live OpenClaw CLI/runtime available from the same host. GitHub-hosted runners are used for full CI validation.

- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

```bash
cd /root/.openclaw/workspace/projects/openclaw-issue-90185/repo
git rev-parse HEAD
npm pack @larksuite/openclaw-lark@2026.5.20
rg "dispatchSystemCommand|system command dispatched|detected system command|plain-text dispatch" /tmp/lark-90185-current/pkg -n
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts --testNamePattern 'compaction hook messages alongside notifyUser notices|onCompactionStart|incomplete compaction notice' --maxWorkers=1 --pool=forks
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts --testNamePattern 'keeps the package testing barrel as a single deprecated bridge' --maxWorkers=1 --pool=forks
pnpm exec oxlint src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts packages/plugin-sdk/src/testing.ts
git diff --check
```

- **Evidence after fix**:

Terminal capture from the real OpenClaw host:

```text
$ git rev-parse HEAD
df98fff0eaf0541546c0cc693e725d0bfa74c59e

$ rg "dispatchSystemCommand|system command dispatched|detected system command|plain-text dispatch" /tmp/lark-90185-current/pkg -n
pkg/src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.d.ts:22:export declare function dispatchSystemCommand(...)
pkg/src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.js:83:async function dispatchSystemCommand(dc, ctxPayload, replyToMessageId) {
pkg/src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.js:86:    dc.log(`feishu[${dc.account.accountId}]: detected system command, using plain-text dispatch`);
pkg/src/messaging/inbound/dispatch-commands.js:120:    dc.log(`feishu[${dc.account.accountId}]: system command dispatched (delivered=${delivered})`);

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts --testNamePattern 'compaction hook messages alongside notifyUser notices|onCompactionStart|incomplete compaction notice' --maxWorkers=1 --pool=forks
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       3 passed | 179 skipped (182)

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-package-contract-guardrails.test.ts --testNamePattern 'keeps the package testing barrel as a single deprecated bridge' --maxWorkers=1 --pool=forks
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       1 passed | 21 skipped (22)

$ pnpm exec oxlint src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts packages/plugin-sdk/src/testing.ts
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.

$ git diff --check
# no output
```

- **Observed result after fix**: The patched compaction runtime now keeps both delivery paths active: hook messages are still sent, and the built-in `notifyUser` start/end/incomplete notices are no longer skipped by hook-message branches. The re-check also shows the external `@larksuite/openclaw-lark@2026.5.20` path named by Bug 1 still exists outside this repo, so this PR should be reviewed as a Bug 2 fix plus bundled Feishu regression guard, not a complete Bug 1 fix.

- **What was not tested**: A live Feishu tenant round-trip for `@larksuite/openclaw-lark@2026.5.20` was not available from this environment, and the external package source is not present in this repository. The large local Feishu test file was attempted but killed by the local VM before assertion output; GitHub-hosted CI is used for full extension validation.

## Readiness

Target readiness after the re-check: 🐚 platinum hermit for the Bug 2 fix. It is no longer claiming 🦀/🦞 for the full #90185 issue because Bug 1 targets an external npm package path not patched by this PR.
